subject: [PATCH 2/2] SUNRPC: Check svc pool percpu counter allocation

reviews.author: Jeff Layton (author)
reviews.summary: Author acknowledged reviewer's concern about potential issues with struct randomization breaking the ordering requirements of svc_pool fields, decided to keep the current implementation as discrete percpu_counter_init/destroy() calls to avoid added complexity.
reviews.raw_body:
Actually, sashiko points out that struct randomization could break here
too. Given that service creation isn't a hot codepath, I'd keep these
as discrete percpu_counter_init/destroy() calls and avoid the hassle.

2026-05-30.patch_summary: This patch adds a comment to the svc_pool struct in the SUNRPC code to note that its percpu counter fields must be ordered together, ensuring future modifications do not inadvertently break this requirement.
